# placeholderValue

**Instance Property**

The value displayed when the element has no value.

## Declaration

```swift
var placeholderValue: String? { get }
```

## Value

- **value**: The raw value attribute of the element.
- **title**: The title attribute of the element.
- **label**: The label attribute of the element.
